name: Silver Aquamarine Amulet
description: When purchasing jewelry, mages prioritize craftsmanship and a correct balance between gems and metals, both of which are vital if one hopes to utilize the materials' mystical properties.
descriptionZh: 法师挑选首饰，主要在意工艺优劣，还有宝石与金属是否相合。要想充分利用材质的神秘学属性，就必须确保这两个方面万无一失。
